title: Map codebase entry points and attack surface
description: Identify all user-controlled inputs, external integrations, authentication boundaries, and trust zones in the codebase.
acceptance_criteria: User-controlled input sources identified (query params, headers, body, files)

title: Authentication and authorization code review
description: Review authentication flows, session management, and access control implementation for security flaws.
acceptance_criteria: Session token entropy and storage reviewed

title: Injection vulnerability analysis
description: Review all database queries, shell commands, template rendering, and serialization for injection vulnerabilities.
acceptance_criteria: All SQL queries verified as parameterized or ORM-based
Shell command execution reviewed for injection

title: Cryptography and secrets management review
description: Audit cryptographic implementations, secret storage, key management, and sensitive data handling.
acceptance_criteria: No hardcoded secrets or API keys in source
Encryption at rest verified for sensitive data

title: Dependency vulnerability audit
description: Check all third-party dependencies for known CVEs and supply chain risks.
acceptance_criteria: All dependencies scanned against CVE database
Outdated packages with security patches identified

title: Build PoC for confirmed vulnerabilities
description: Develop minimal proof-of-concept exploits to confirm SAST findings are exploitable, not just patterns.
acceptance_criteria: PoC developed for each high/critical confirmed finding
Exploitability assessed in context of deployment

title: Generate SAST report with remediation guidance
description: Export all confirmed SAST findings with code-level remediation recommendations.
acceptance_criteria: All confirmed findings documented with file:line references
SARIF report generated for CI/CD integration
